parameters.jsCode:
// ===========================================
// /help — Command Reference
// ===========================================

const helpText = `\uD83D\uDCDA **pulse Command Reference**

**\uD83D\uDD0D Query Commands**
  \u2022 \`/today\` \u2014 View today's quest board
  \u2022 \`/brief\` \u2014 View top 5 milestone briefings
  \u2022 \`/brief all\` \u2014 View all milestones
  \u2022 \`/stats {N}\` \u2014 View N-day statistics (default: 7)
  \u2022 \`/deferred\` \u2014 View all deferred quests
  \u2022 \`/preview\` \u2014 Preview tomorrow's quests
  \u2022 \`/weekly\` \u2014 Weekly summary report

**\u2705 Interactive Commands**
  \u2022 \`/complete\` \u2014 Mark quests as completed
  \u2022 \`/cancel\` \u2014 Cancel quests
  \u2022 \`/defer\` \u2014 Defer quests to later
  \u2022 \`/restore\` \u2014 Restore deferred quests
  \u2022 \`/edit\` \u2014 Edit quest time or priority

**\u26A1 Action Commands**
  \u2022 \`/add {name} {duration}\` \u2014 Add a manual quest
  \u2022 \`/regen\` \u2014 Regenerate today's quests

_Tip: Interactive commands show a numbered list. Reply with numbers to select (e.g., 1,3 or 1-3)._`;

return [{
  json: {
    response_type: 'info',
    message: helpText,
    data: null,
    suggestions: [],
    awaiting_input: false,
  }
}];

// Pass through error response from router
return [$input.first()];

parameters.content:
## W2 - LobeHub Command Handler

**Purpose:** Handle all slash commands from LobeHub via webhook.

**Trigger:** Webhook — HTTP POST with X-API-Key auth.

**Implemented Commands:**
- /today — Quest board view
- /complete — Interactive quest completion
- /cancel — Interactive quest cancellation
- /defer — Interactive quest deferral with warning
- /add — Manual quest addition
- /help — Command reference
- ping — Connectivity test

**Pending Commands (Epic 4+):**
- /restore, /edit, /regen
- /brief, /stats, /deferred, /preview, /weekly

**Error Workflow:** W5 (error-handler)

**Response Format:** Standard JSON: response_type, message, data, suggestions, awaiting_input
